options.name: -aioRowCluster
options.description: specifies the area I/O row cluster name

options.name: -allAIORowCluster
options.description: deletes all area I/O filler cells from all area I/O row clusters

options.name: -cell
options.description: specifies the name of the area I/O filler cell to delete

options.name: -inst
options.description: specifies the area I/O filler instance name to delete

options.name: -prefix
options.description: specifies the prefix name of the area I/O filler cell instance to be removed
